overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's corporate district. The player ascends a covered pedestrian walkway lined with holographic advertisements, exits into an open plaza surrounded by futuristic glass skyscrapers, and approaches a busy intersection with vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with commercial advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined corridor with stairs through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera in the opposite direction at the start of the segment

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with orange structural beams and overhead metal grating
large red advertisement display for ChroManticore with health warning text
advertisement showing hands with text about corporate wear luxury

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian corridor with orange structural elements. The player ascends a slight incline while passing large holographic advertisements for ChroManticore and Dynalar on the right wall. A single NPC walks past in the opposite direction at the start.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition plaza between covered walkway and open corporate square

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open urban plaza with skyscrapers becoming visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the enclosed walkway into the open plaza area with increasing visibility of surrounding towers

entered.detail: large suspended digital billboard displaying corporate advertisements above the walkway
rectangular concrete planter with palm trees in the center of the plaza
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered corridor into a semi-open transition area. Large digital screens hang overhead while palm tree planters line the path. The Dynalar billboard recedes into the distance as a massive glass corporate tower comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corporate plaza surrounded by high-rise commercial towers

events.description: turning left toward the main street intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and turning left toward the street intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: group of corporate workers walking across the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: floating holographic display showing a seated figure in white
angular tiered parking garage with multiple levels and illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open corporate plaza, the player passes between towering glass buildings with illuminated facades. A holographic advertisement floats on the right while pedestrians walk through the square. The camera turns left toward a busy intersection, revealing a multi-level parking structure on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: approaching the yellow striped crosswalk markings at the intersection
multiple futuristic vehicles including red sports cars passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk edge and beginning to cross as traffic passes through the intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection followed by other traffic
dark sedan turning left at the intersection

entered.detail: bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
futuristic traffic light pole with digital displays and vertical light strips

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a busy urban intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. Futuristic vehicles including red sports cars drive through the intersection while the player waits and begins to cross. The multi-level parking structure looms larger on the left, and traffic signals regulate the flow of cars and pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined corporate corridor into a sprawling, high-tech urban intersection. It begins by ascending a slight incline within a covered pedestrian walkway, passing orange structural beams and large holographic advertisements for ChroManticore and Dynalar. As the camera exits the corridor, the space opens into a transition area where digital screens hang overhead and palm tree planters line the path, bringing a massive glass corporate tower into view. The scene then expands into a wide corporate plaza surrounded by towering illuminated buildings and floating holograms before turning left toward the city's infrastructure. Finally, the movement leads directly into a busy intersection marked by yellow crosswalks, where futuristic red sports cars flow past a looming multi-level parking structure under the direction of traffic signals.
